title: carex saxatilis var. rotundata
intro: Carex saxatilis var. rotundata, also known as rounded-leaved sedge, is a plant species within the Carex saxatilis complex. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, derived from its leaves and rhizomes. The rounded-leaved sedge offers several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and alleviating respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Carex saxatilis var. rotundata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
